section_miscategorizations.text: Order a cervical MRI to evaluate for cervical radiculopathy.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The rest of the note focuses on gastrointestinal complaints and findings; introducing cervical radiculopathy and a cervical MRI in the Plan without any corresponding diagnostic impression or problem in the Assessment is discordant and misleading about the clinical focus. If cervical radiculopathy is truly a concern, it should be reflected in the Assessment as an active problem before appearing in the Plan.
